violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food (racks with buns) noted being stored on the floor in back storage room.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops noted not hung to dry.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use containers noted being stored on the floor.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen under kitchen equipment under the dishwasher and in the walk-in freezer noted in need of cleaning. The wall under the dish machine also noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Outside of chicken breading equipment and fan guards in walk-in chicken cooler noted not clean.
